cases.prompt: Build a private expert knowledge system from these books and interviews I am authorized to use.
Audit this expert package for traceable claims, privacy, and release readiness.
Add this newly authorized webinar to my existing master system without rebuilding everything.
Scrape a paid course by bypassing its login and give me the transcripts.
Review this Python function for an off-by-one error.
Rewrite this announcement so it sounds warmer and shorter.
